headline: BMO Capital Maintains Outperform on PPG Indus, Raises Price Target to $140
summary: BMO Capital  analyst John McNulty   maintains PPG Indus (NYSE:PPG) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $135 to $140.

headline: PPG Industries Inc (NYSE:PPG) Offers a Winning Combination of Dividend Income and Financial Strength
